name: visibility-sdklib-pending-summary-2026-06-29
description: Review all docs under visibility/docs and produce a summary document (2026-06-29-visibility-sdklib-pending.md) outlining pending changes in visibility and needed cloud-sdk library enhancements.

entries.summary: Reviewed all visibility/docs; consolidated pending visibility changes + cloud-sdk library gaps
entries.detail: Reviewed 06-23 (rebase/refactor), 06-24 (sns-sqs-coverage), 06-25 (sns-sqs-refactor complete), 06-26 (AWS resource inventory), 06-27 (correctness review) docs + 06-01 summary. ION-12316 SQS/SNS/DynamoDB/S3/SES/SSM migration is functionally complete and PR #1066 is open to develop. Pending visibility code items: F1 HIGH-latent (fresh-create attribute-name mismatch, fix B2+C), F8 MEDIUM (outbound TTL would be enabled), F2 MEDIUM (s3-archiver socket 300s->30s, maxConn 100->50), F3 LOW-MED (new 30s apiCallTimeout), F4 LOW (N attrs archived as quoted strings), F5 LOW (streams not managed - deferred/agreed), F6 LOW (SNS payload byte-identical contract test), F7 LOW (OffsetDateTimeTypeConverter null throws), plus SES EmailService wrapper adoption opportunity. cloud-sdk library enhancements needed: (1) EntityTableMetadata ignores @DynamoDbAttribute for key/GSI names; (2) EntityTableMetadata ignores @DynamoDbConvertedBy on key types; (3) no raw/schemaless getItem (RawItemRepository); (4) AwsStorageConfig.Builder lacks socket/connection-timeout/maxConnections + default-cred fallback; (5) cloud-sdk-aws pulls newer io.searchbox:jest breaking consumers; (6) Guava version mgmt in commons/BOM; (7) OffsetDateTimeTypeConverter null defensiveness.

Created visibility/docs/2026-06-29-visibility-sdklib-pending.md consolidating: (A) pending visibility code changes F1-F8 + SES wrapper + A.4 operational config discrepancies, and (B) seven cloud-sdk library enhancements B-1..B-7, plus a suggested sequencing (C). Document links all 7 source docs reviewed. ION-12316 migration is functionally complete, PR #1066 open to develop, build green (1009 unit + 40 IT).

entries.summary: Added explicit session_record_usage token-telemetry instructions to copilot-instructions.md
entries.detail: User believed copilot-instructions.md already required session token-usage recording; it did not. Verified: only an existing 'model_info' logging line at line 103, no session_record_usage instruction. Added explicit token-usage telemetry instructions to the Session Context Protocol: a DURING-conversation bullet to call session_record_usage after expensive turns (pass input_tokens uncached, output_tokens, cache_read/creation, model) and an END-conversation bullet to record final usage, noting that without it telemetry_report/session_usage_report show record_count=0 and $0.00.
Agent model for this session: Claude Opus 4.8 (GitHub Copilot).
